title: Crispy Garlic Paella Rice Stir-Fry
description: A delicious one-pot dish featuring crispy garlic-infused paella rice marinated in a blend of herbs and spices for added flavor.

ingredients.name: 1 cup paella rice
ingredients.notes: Use a non-stick pan if necessary to avoid sticking.

instructions: In a large bowl, mix the paella rice with minced garlic and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper.
Fold in lemon juice and white wine into the rice mixture. Toss well to combine evenly.
Transfer the rice mixture onto an oven-safe baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Spread out evenly.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is crispy on top and golden brown underneath.
While the rice is baking, heat a pan over medium-high heat. Add chicken thighs (if using) and cook for about 8-10 minutes per side until fully cooked.
Add bell peppers and onions to the same pan with olive oil. Stir-fry for an additional 5 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
Garnish with fresh herbs if desired. Serve hot as a main course, alongside any complementary dishes such as salads or roasted vegetables.
